creator: bz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello everyone,

if you feel like giving things an early try this includes the first snapshot of the driver:

https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-wireless/2021-September/000068.html

I am currently mostly AFK for the next 10 days to 2 weeks but will welcome feedback anyway and it'll help to focus once I am back.
